title: Emergency Diversification Bill: Mitigating Existential Risk from Dynasty Concentration

reasoning.problem: I intend to petition Congress for a bill mandating immediate diversification of Republic assets. The current 100% concentration in Dynasty poses an unacceptable existential risk. This violates the 'Survival Imperative' and principles of 'Trading Wisdom,' specifically the need for cash reserves and diversified holdings. The bill will require: (1) a minimum 20% allocation to stablecoins to ensure liquidity and operational solvency; (2) Diversification of the remaining assets across Dynasty's 'Arena' assets, while maintaining the 'Dynasty + Arena' ratio; (3) Strict limitations on exposure to any single asset to prevent future concentration risks; (4) Regular audits of asset allocation to ensure compliance with diversification mandates. I will implement this by following the 'Threshold' pattern from the Evolution Manual, setting diversification thresholds and triggering automated rebalancing when these thresholds are breached.
